---
title: "Teaching Hub"
---

::: {.hub-hero}
# Machine Learning Summer School 2026

::: {.hub-lead}
Central place for **slides**, **student notebooks**, **module notes**, and **interactive demos** (Shinylive stubs you can extend). Exercises stay outside this site.
:::
:::

::: {.hub-grid}
::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Slides
:::
### Day decks (revealjs)

- [Day 1 — Monday](slides/day-01-monday.qmd): linear / logistic intuition, OLS, AIC, ridge & lasso, course figures
- [Day 2 — Tuesday](slides/day-02-tuesday.qmd): two cultures, trees, tidymodels pipeline
- [Day 3 — Thursday](slides/day-03-thursday.qmd): ensembles, metrics, imbalance, SHAP

Every slide deck shows a **Teaching Hub** link in the footer to return here.
:::

::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Notebooks
:::
### For students (`.Rmd`)

- [Notebook overview](notebooks/index.qmd)
- [Linear regression + LASSO](notebooks/linear-regression-lasso.Rmd)
- [Logistic regression + tree](notebooks/logistic-regression-gene-disease.Rmd)
:::

::: {.hub-card}
::: {.hub-pill}
Planning
:::
### Reusable material

- [Curriculum outline](curriculum-outline.qmd) — schedule, goals, iteration ideas
- [Module library](modules/index.qmd) — short reusable topic pages
- [App library](apps/index.qmd) — Shinylive / Shiny placeholders
- Shared tidymodels template: `_includes/tidymodels-pipeline.qmd` (used in slides + Module 04)
:::
:::

## Course flow (three days)

- **Monday:** foundations, bias–variance, OLS, stepwise AIC, ridge/lasso, logistic intro
- **Tuesday:** Breiman’s “two cultures”, decision trees, `tidymodels` grammar and workflows
- **Thursday:** random forest, boosting, neural nets, imbalance & imputation, metrics, SHAP & friends
